description: <b>Style Note</b>Fresh from doodle's range of tops, myntra stocks the prettiest ones for your little one. Perfectly suited for her whimsical taste, this piece looks good paired with denim skirts or capris.<b>Product Details</b>Round neck top with short sleeves, light and dark pink stripes and a bow detail towards the left side of the chest<b>Material and Care</b>100% cottonWash separatelyDry in shadeDo not iron on printDo not rub or twist the garmentsStyle NoteThe collection of doodle t-shirts are best used in the summer to soak up some sun and act like you are on the beach walking on the grainy sand and teamed up with a pair of shorts. It will most definately intrigue a kidProduct DetailsBlue shirt with a graphic print on the chest and a round neckMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separately Dry in shadeDo not iron on printDo not rub or twist the garments
